---
title: "zealhmm"
subtitle: "Teosinte-introgression QTL recovery under low-coverage genotyping — TeoNAM (Chen 2019) and ZEAL/BZea"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: zeal
    contents:
      - analysis/zeal-*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Notebook"
      subtitle: "Description"
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  - id: teonam
    contents:
      - analysis/teonam-*.qmd
      - analysis/marker-thinning.qmd
      - analysis/callers-and-methods.qmd
      - analysis/simulation-calibration.qmd
      - analysis/source-method-comparison.qmd
      - analysis/b1-mapping-benchmark.qmd
      - analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.qmd
      - analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Notebook"
      subtitle: "Description"
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

Analysis notebooks for recovering QTL from teosinte introgressions under low-coverage
genotyping, across two maize×teosinte populations. Data provenance: [DATA.html](DATA.html).

## ZEAL / BZea — Zea Exotic Allele Library

B73 × teosinte **BC2S3 near-isogenic lines**; 5 teosinte taxa (Zx *mexicana*, Zv *parviglumis*,
Zd *diploperennis*, Zl *luxurians*, Zh *huehuetenangensis*); SNP50K panel at ~0.4× skim. Built
end-to-end from field books + skim counts: samplesheet → SpATS BLUEs → SNP50K dosage → RTIGER
ancestry mosaic → K → JLM + MLM.

::: {#zeal}
:::

## TeoNAM — Chen 2019 reproduction

W22 × {TIL01, TIL03, TIL11, TIL14, TIL25}; 1,257 **BC1S4 RILs**; 118K / 51K SNP panels (v5). The
faithful reproduction plus the low-coverage ancestry-caller benchmarks (nNIL, RTIGER, LB-Impute,
binhmm, control) and genetic-map / calibration methods.

::: {#teonam}
:::
